steps.title: Find the scale factor
steps.content: Each side length of parallelogram WXYZ is $3$ times the corresponding side length of parallelogram JKLM, so the linear scale factor is $3$.

steps.title: Square the scale factor
steps.content:
For similar figures, areas scale by the square of the linear scale factor.
$$3^2=9$$

steps.title: Scale the given area
steps.content:
Multiply the area of parallelogram JKLM by the area scale factor.
$$4\cdot 9=36$$
The answer is C.
